violations.text: Packages of shredded cheese observed with mold.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tongs) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to 3 bay sink for washing and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

(Deli meats and cheese ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of (dry ingredients ). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table table shelves and slicer ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed.Observed air breaks.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The ceilings throughout the establishment is in poor repair.Observed holes, missing tiles, and/or water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025

The following physical facilities an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or dust: 1.ceiling vents 2.ceilings tiles 3.pipes under prep and 3 bay sinks 4.floors 5.walk in cooler fan vents. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
